attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SMSSCC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY  
,COALESCE( WCSSC.SR_NUMBER , -999 ) SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT       
,COALESCE( WCSSC.ORDER_SA_NUMBER , 'UNKNOWN' ) SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTARCT_NUM 
,COALESCE( WCSSC.ORDER_NUMBER , -999 ) SRC_RPTD_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT 
,COALESCE( WCSSC.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER , -999 ) SRC_RPTD_PRODUCT_PART_NUM   
,COALESCE( WCSSC.SRVC_LINE, 'UNKNOWN' ) SR_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
,COALESCE( WCSSC.SRVC_OFFERING , 'UNKNOWN' )  SR_ALLOCATED_SERVICE_GROUP_ID 
,COALESCE( WCSSC.SRVC_CATEGORY , 'UNKNOWN' )  SR_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID    
,COALESCE( WCSSC.HW_FAMILY , 'UNKNOWN' ) SR_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID 
,COALESCE( WCSSC.C3_CUST_THEATER   , 'UNKNOWN' )   C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME      
,COALESCE( WCSSC.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT  , 'UNKNOWN' ) C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
,COALESCE(FAILURE_CODE,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT, 0)
,COALESCE(CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP  ,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,0 )  
,COALESCE(COUNTRY_CODE ,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(CUSTOMER,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(LOOKUP_THEATER  ,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(ENT_PRODUCT_ID ,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY, 'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY , 'UNKNOWN')
,SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH      
,COALESCE(EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST ,0)
,COALESCE(ALLOCATED_COST,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DEPT_COST,0)  SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DEPRECIATION_COST,0)  SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT 
,COALESCE( WCSSC.REPAIR_COST,0 ) SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT       
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DUTY_VAT_COST,0 ) SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT     
,COALESCE( WCSSC.TPL_COST,0) SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT
,COALESCE( WCSSC.TPM_COST,0) SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT
,COALESCE( WCSSC.OEM_COST,0) SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT 
,COALESCE( PCT.SSC_COGS_PCT,0) SSC_WARRANTY_PCT      
,CNTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,COALESCE(WCSSC.SRVC_OFFERING,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_OFFERING_NAME 
,COALESCE(WCSSC.SITE_THEATER,'UNKNOWN') AS INSTALL_SITE_THEATER_NAME     
,COALESCE(WCSSC.COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_CNTRY_NAME
,COALESCE(WCSSC.SRVC_LINE,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_LINE
,COALESCE(WCSSC.HW_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_HW_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME  
,COALESCE(WCSSC.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_HYBRID_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME
,COALESCE(WCSSC.SITE_COUNTRY,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_SITE_CNTRY_NAME      
,COALESCE(RFMTY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_CAL_CD    
,COALESCE(RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,-999) AS BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,-999) AS BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_IN
,COALESCE(RFMTY2.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_CAL_CD      
,COALESCE(RFMTY2.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,-999) AS BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(RFMTY2.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,-999) AS BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT 
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DEPT_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DPRCTN_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DPRCTN_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.REPAIR_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DUTY_VAT_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DUTY_VAT_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.TPL_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.TPL_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.OEM_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,WCSSC.RMA_CREDIT_APPLIED_FLG
/*Addition of New Umpire Credit amounts as part of JUN FY22 Release*/
,COALESCE( DEPR_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( REPAIR_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( WCSSC.DUTY_VAT_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
,COALESCE( TPL_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0)
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CST_SSC_COGS WCSSC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CNTRL
ON CNTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME = WCSSC.FISCAL_MONTH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
ON RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CNTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY2
ON RFMTY2.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME  = WCSSC.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST SMSSCC
ON (SMSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND SMSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
AND SMSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = RFMTY2.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND SMSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT =  RFMTY2.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND SMSSCC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT = WCSSC.SR_NUMBER
AND SMSSCC.SRC_RPTD_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT = WCSSC.ORDER_NUMBER
AND SMSSCC.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_PART_NUM = WCSSC.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CST_ADJ_OH_AND_WRNTY_PCT PCT
ON PCT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME = CNTRL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

SELECT 
 SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY AS SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
 , SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
 , COALESCE(NSR.BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT , -999 )BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
 , SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTARCT_NUM AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
 , C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME AS C3_CUST_THEATER_NAME       
 , C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME AS C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
 , SR_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS SRC_RPTD_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ID
 , SR_ALLOCATED_SERVICE_GROUP_ID AS SRC_RPTD_ALLCTD_SERVICE_GROUP_ID
 , SR_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID
 , SR_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS SRC_RPTD_PRDT_FAMILY_ID
 , SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT AS SSC_DEPT_PRSNL_RSRC_COST_USD_AMT
 , SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT AS SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT
 , SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT
 , SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT
 , SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT AS SSC_THIRD_PRTY_LOGISTICS_COST_USD_AMT
 , SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT AS SSC_THIRD_PARTY_MNTNC_COST_USD_AMT 
 , SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT AS SSC_ORIG_EQUIP_MNFCTR_COST_USD_AMT
 , SSC_WARRANTY_PCT
 , SRC_RPTD_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 , SRC_RPTD_PRODUCT_PART_NUM AS SRC_RPTD_PRDT_PART_NUM
 , BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_CAL_CD
 , BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
 , BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
 , COALESCE(NRO.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT , -999 ) AS BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 , COALESCE(RP.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS BK_SR_HW_PRDT_KEY
 , 'N' SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 , WSSSCC.FAILURE_CODE AS FAILURE_CD
 , WSSSCC.WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT AS WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT
 , WSSSCC.CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP AS CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP_NAME
 , WSSSCC.QUANTITY_SHIPPED AS SHIPPED_QTY 
 , WSSSCC.CUSTOMER AS SRC_RPTD_CUST_NAME
 , WSSSCC.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST AS EXTND_STD_COST_USD_AMT
 , WSSSCC.ALLOCATED_COST AS ALLOCATED_COST_USD_AMT
 , WSSSCC.LOOKUP_THEATER AS LOOKUP_THEATER_NAME
 , WSSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_CAL_CD
 , WSSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
 , WSSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT
 , WSSSCC.SERVICE_OFFERING_NAME 
 , WSSSCC.INSTALL_SITE_THEATER_NAME 
 , WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_CNTRY_NAME 
 , WSSSCC.ENT_PRODUCT_ID AS SRC_RPTD_ENTERPRISE_PRDT_ID
 , WSSSCC.COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS SRC_RPTD_COVERED_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME
 , WSSSCC.ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS SRC_RPTD_ENTERPRISE_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME
 , WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_LINE_NAME 
 , WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_HW_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME 
 , WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_HYBRID_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME 
 , WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_SITE_CNTRY_NAME 
 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
 , USER EDW_CREATE_USER
 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 , USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
 , 'I' ACTION_CODE
 , 'I' DML_TYPE 
,DEPT_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,DPRCTN_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,DPRCTN_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,REPAIR_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,DUTY_VAT_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,DUTY_VAT_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,TPL_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,TPL_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,OEM_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,RMA_CREDIT_APPLIED_FLG     
/*Addition of New Umpire Credit Amounts as part of JUNFY22 Release*/
,DEPR_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,DUTY_VAT_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,REPAIR_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,TPL_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST  WSSSCC  
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REPAIR_ORDER NRO
 ON NRO.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT=WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 LEFT OUTER   JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SERVICE_REQUEST_TV NSR
 ON (NSR.BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT=WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT and END_TV_DTM ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
 ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=WSSSCC.SRC_RPTD_PRODUCT_PART_NUM
 AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'   /* ADDED AS PART OF M&A JUN10 Q4FY18*/
